reason: This is a common Islamic religious phrase/prayer meaning 'Allah is sufficient for me, there is no deity except Him, upon Him I rely, and He is the Lord of the Great Throne.' Nothing indicates ISIS support.
original_post: حَسْبِيَ اللَّهُ لا إِلَـهَ إِلاَّ هُوَ عَلَيْهِ تَوَكَّلْتُ وَهُوَ رَبُّ الْعَرْشِ الْعَظِيمِ - via - 215
